title: alyssum diffusum
intro: Alyssum diffusum, also known as sweet alyssum or sweet woodruff, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve stress. The health benefits of alyssum diffusum include reducing anxiety and promoting a good night's sleep, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Alyssum diffusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
